    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    List<Integer>
    SfsStructureType.allowed_on_island
    Serialized JSON array of island type IDs
    List<Integer>
    SfsMonster.box_requirements
    An array of monster species IDs, where an ID occurs as many times in the list as it is required to be zapped
    List<Integer>
    SfsMonster.boxed_eggs
    An array of monster species IDs, where an ID occurs as many times in the list as it has already been zapped.
    Long
    SfsStructure.building_completed
    The timestamp at which a timer on the structure will finish (for example, clearing an obstacle)
    Integer
    SfsMonsterLevel.coins
    Coins produced per minute
    String
    SfsMonster.collection_type
    Certain monsters, like Wublins, indicate what kind of currency will be collected at next collection
    String
    SfsVisitData.country
     
    Long
    SfsStructure.date_created
    The timestamp at which a timer on the structure starts (for example, clearing an obstacle)
    Long
    SfsTribe.date_created
     
    String
    SfsMonsterSpecies.discovered_by
    Who "discovered" the monster.
    Long
    SfsMonster.egg_timer_start
    When the timer started on filling a timed deactivated monster (like a Wublin)
    Long
    SfsTribe.ends_on
     
    Integer
    SfsMonsterLevel.ethereal_currency
    Shards produced per hour
    SFSObject
